meta.context: STRATEGY-005: '23 excellent, tested, deployed tools and Rs.0 validated revenue.' Recorded REVENUE-SPRINT-001 decision = publish the Income-Tax API on RapidAPI. Founder note adds NEW directions (sell AI-agent packages, rent AI employees, automated YouTube) — unreconciled with the recorded decision.
meta.scoring: priorityScore = round(impact^2 * confidence / difficulty *10)/10; impact/difficulty 1-5, confidence 0.5-1.0 — deterministic estimate, not measured.

opportunities.title: Income-Tax API on RapidAPI (subscription/usage) — the recorded first-customer path
opportunities.evidence: API live + documented; public auth seam ready; deprecated RapidAPI incumbent = market gap
opportunities.notes: Fastest ethical path to first paid subscriber; expand coverage to raise WTP.

opportunities.title: Additional calculation APIs (EMI/SIP/GST) reusing the v1 pattern
opportunities.evidence: deterministic engines exist; v1 API is a reusable template
opportunities.notes: Widen the API product line after income-tax proves the model.

opportunities.title: Comparison-surface affiliate/sponsored partnerships (loans/demat/insurance)
opportunities.evidence: comparisons.ts sponsored field + disclosure + GA events wired; guard test blocks until a real partner
opportunities.notes: Privacy-first: must keep disclosure + fair comparisons; competitors monetise this intent.

opportunities.title: AdSense on high-traffic pages
opportunities.evidence: ads/index.ts disabled stub; CSP allows it
opportunities.notes: Only enable after Gate-0 traffic validates; risk to UX/SEO if premature.

opportunities.title: Premium calculator features (PDF reports, saved profiles, ad-free)
opportunities.evidence: financial-dashboard/roadmap persist a profile + CSV export already
opportunities.notes: Low-price, no-login upgrade fits privacy-first positioning.

opportunities.title: Downloadable AI-agent packages (local LLM / own API key; code not shared)
opportunities.notes: NEW revenue line; must pass STRATEGY-005/006 gate before build; largest upside, least validated.

opportunities.title: Automated YouTube Shorts channel (traffic + brand, feeds all levers)
opportunities.evidence: founder note items 3&5; grow-esytol Publisher supports youtube/shorts
opportunities.notes: Not direct revenue but the missing top-of-funnel; zero video content today.

opportunities.title: White-label / enterprise calculator embeds
opportunities.notes: Keep parked until inbound demand appears.

reconciliation.discrepancy: The recorded decision is API-first and does NOT include the founder-note directions. These are additive new bets, not yet run through STRATEGY-005 (revenue-first selection) or STRATEGY-006 (capital allocation).
reconciliation.recommendation: Keep the API launch as the near-term direct-revenue spearhead (highest confidence, infra-ready); run the AI-agent/YouTube directions through the capital-allocation gate as parallel bets; unblock Gate-0 analytics FIRST so every choice becomes evidence-driven instead of blind.
